name: openEuler sig-UKUI SIG
description: The UKUI team is responsible for the development and maintenance of UKUI desktop in openeuler community.

name: openEuler sig-UKUI SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-UKUI SIG maintains 148 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UKUI SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The UKUI team is responsible for the development and maintenance of UKUI desktop in openeuler community.. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 148 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-UKUI SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-UKUI SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at ukui@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-UKUI SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UKUI SIG maintains 148 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-UKUI.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-UKUI SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UKUI SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Li Jianfeng, Dou Yan, Hua Yadong. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
